series_metadata.series_description: These are quarterly reports detailing statements of assets and liabilities, income and expenses of each bank and trust department. These reports are now maintained electronically by the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation and available on its website.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed on computer. Upon confirmation that paper copy was checked quality and completeness, . ; Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: electronic files no longer of administrative value
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
